title: Slash AI Costs: Smart Model Choice for Max ROAI! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof advocates for strategic model selection based on task complexity to optimize Return on AI Investment (ROAI) and reduce costs. The core argument is that not all tasks require powerful models, and matching model complexity to actual needs improves efficiency.
writeup: Cyril Imhof argues for selecting AI models by task complexity to improve Return on AI Investment and cut costs. The central point: not every task needs a powerful model, and matching model capability to actual requirements raises efficiency. The takeaway is to route simpler tasks to lighter models and reserve heavier models for work that genuinely demands them.
